option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Build stage FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build WORKDIR /app COPY pom.xml . COPY src ./src RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests
# Run stage FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /app/target/promed-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar app.jar EXPOSE 8080 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
services: # Backend - Spring Boot - type: web name: promed-backend runtime: docker dockerfilePath: ./Dockerfile envVars: - key: PORT value: 8080
# Frontend - React/Vite - type: web name: promed-frontend runtime: node rootDir: frontend buildCommand: npm install && npm run build staticPublishPath: dist envVars: - key: NODE_VERSION value: 20
